Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/hetzner_forestinventory root@46.62.154.200 << 'ENDSSH'
TOKEN=$\(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/realms/master/protocol/openid-connect/token \\
  -d 'client_id=admin-cli' \\
  -d 'username=admin' \\
  -d 'password=admin' \\
  -d 'grant_type=password' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)["access_token"]\)'\)

echo "Token: ${TOKEN:0:20}..."

curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:8080/admin/realms/forest-realm \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \\
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
  -d '{"smtpServer":{"host":"smtp.resend.com","port":"465","ssl":"true","starttls":"false","auth":"true","user":"resend","password":"re_ZmroBzFd_Lb7btxGFP9gEcAtt2ZzYqmoV","from":"system@natureport.eu","fromDisplayName":"Forest Inventory"}}' \\
  -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}'
ENDSSH)
